response.justification: Staff-level engineer with 15+ years across full-stack roles, explicitly matches the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) and brings direct AI agent development experience from current role at re:cinq. Seniority significantly exceeds mid-senior requirement with demonstrated architecture and scaling expertise. Minor gaps in framework-specific tooling (Nest.js, Vitest) are easily addressable given strong foundational engineering practices.
strengths: Direct stack alignment: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker explicitly demonstrated across recent roles
AI agent development experience (MCP frameworks) directly from current position, a differentiating skill listed in requirements
Exceeds seniority with Staff-level current role and 15+ years experience; strong evidence of architecture and scaling decisions on high-throughput systems
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned; primary experience appears to be vanilla Node.js rather than the specified framework
Vitest and Playwright not specifically called out despite strong testing culture; Selenium and Jest mentioned instead
Kotlin and Python not evident in resume; Java mentioned minimally despite being listed as secondary required languages

key_factors.factor: Primary stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS)
Current AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
